name: Order and Checkout Core
primary_area: Ash / Sales / Checkout / Redis integration boundary / State transitions / Tests
forbidden_changes: Direct Redis inventory mutation outside ReservationLedger

red_requires_failure_when: Checkout can be created without ReservationLedger.reserve/5
Checkout succeeds when Redis/inventory is unavailable
Checkout succeeds for disabled or closed offer
Checkout succeeds with invalid quantity or max_per_order violation
OrderLine does not snapshot price/offer fields
Order reaches awaiting_payment before hold attachment
StateTransition is missing for Order or CheckoutSession status change
customer_session can broadly read orders or checkout sessions
Checkout calls Paystack, WhatsApp, ticket issuance, Attendee, scanner, or UI code
Logs/errors include PII, tokens, Redis internals, or raw provider payloads
green_requires: Valid checkout creates Order, OrderLine, CheckoutSession, Redis hold, and StateTransition rows
Checkout validates offer enabled status, sales window, quantity, and max_per_order
Checkout fails closed on Redis outage
Insufficient inventory is rejected without valid checkout session
Duplicate idempotency key does not double-reserve
StateTransition rows are append-only and complete
No forbidden boundary behavior is added
No PII/secrets/tokens/raw payloads in logs or error returns

performance_impact: Adds durable checkout/order spine while keeping live inventory in Redis and avoiding Postgres live counter reads
security_impact: Handles buyer PII in durable orders; logs/errors must be redacted and customer_session broad reads forbidden
